name: Protein Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Beat the liquid ingredients (including 2 tbsp of oil) together and add them to the dry mixture. Stir until well combined, using a wooden spoon to mash out any lumps.
3. Add more liquid if necessary; the batter should pour off the spoon slowly but smoothly. Water can be used instead of milk after adding the first 1 1/2 cups of milk.
4. Brush a hot skillet with oil or butter and ensure it is well greased.
5. Cook the pancakes on one side over medium-high heat until bubbles form, then turn and cook briefly on the other side.
6. Transfer to a warm plate. Makes 12 pancakes.
